chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَتَزَوَّجُ الْمَرْأَةَ وَ يَتَزَوَّجُ أُمَّ وَلَدِ أَبِيهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 35 – The man marries the woman, and he marries the mother of the child of her father

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/79)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/79)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يَتَزَوَّجُ الْمَرْأَةَ وَ يَتَزَوَّجُ أُمَّ وَلَدٍ لِأَبِيهَا قَالَ لَا بَأْسَ بِذَلِكَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Muhammad Bin Sinan,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al Hassan<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the man who married the woman and he married a mother of the children of her father. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no problem with that’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn from Muhammad ibn Sinan who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a man who marries a woman and a mother of the child of her father. He (the Imam) said, ‘It is not unlawful.”’
